creator: dwmalone@maths.tcd.ie
text:
On Fri, May 18, 2001 at 01:14:25PM -0700, thorstedsl@utahlinx.com wrote:
>"Extracting Bin into / directory"  Then I get this message:
>"Write failure on transfer (wrote -1 bytes of 240640 bytes)"
> I retry and it tries to load up to the same point and then gives
> the same error message.

My first guess is that you're making the root filesystem big enough.
Can you check the other virtual terminals (by pressing ALT+F1,
ALT+F2, ...) to see if there are any error messages.

	David.
